description_long: This is a tall, dark green glass bottle with a long neck and a narrow mouth, standing upright on a round wooden surface. The front of the bottle features a colorful, festive label with the word 'Glühwein' in white script, a gold star at the top, and an illustrated winter scene with a Christmas tree and a snowy village. The label also indicates a volume of 1.0L and an alcohol content of 8.7% vol. The bottle appears to have a metallic or plastic cap at the top, which is not highly detailed in the images. The glass surface is glossy and smooth, reflecting light, and the bottle is free of any visible damage or deformation. No liquid is clearly visible inside, and the bottle's body is opaque, preventing a view of the interior.
description: A tall, dark green glass bottle with a festive 'Glühwein' label and a gold star, standing on a wooden surface. The bottle is glossy, smooth, and undamaged, with a narrow neck and opaque body.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed 'Glühwein' label with a gold star, winter scene, and text.
description_view_1: Angled side view revealing the edge of the label and the bottle's glossy, dark green surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unadorned dark green glass with no label or markings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other edge of the label and the bottle's smooth, reflective surface.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front label with 'Glühwein' in white script, a gold star, a winter village scene, and volume/alcohol content details in white and red; festive and colorful design.
